title: Commodities extend gains as supply issues re-emerge
section_path: Commodities extend gains as supply issues re-emerge
section_path_text: Commodities extend gains as supply issues re-emerge
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Sentiment across markets was boosted by further signs of easing inflationary pressures. Commodities gained as the subsequent weaker USD supported investor appetite in the sector. Crude oil gained as focus returned to supply side issues.
